meaning: engine [机]汪克尔发动机(亦作 Wankel)
examples: The Wankel-type rotary engines are very reliable because of their simplicity.
It is also generally conceded that Wankel engines are quieter than comparable piston engines.
More significant engines from OS history: (Left) an OS-Graupner Wankel RE-I-49 from 1968 and (Right) a 1950 OS 29.
Before Doug Wankel could do anything in Uruzgan, he had to talk to the Dutch.
Wankel was on his back, and both his legs were pinned under the vehicle.
